title: ReciPeas - Better Crafting Recipes
description: Your friendly neighborhood recipe data-pack, adds a lot of new, updated and cheaper recipes for a lot of things!
body:
# ReciPeas! Sorry, there are no peas here. However what there is, is a great datapack that will add balanced, interesting and cheaper crafting recipes to your minecraft world or server. Ever wanted to upgrade a specific iron tool to diamond? Now you can, how about green dye, its quite hard to get. Well its not anymore, you can craft these things now! ReciPeas adds a lot of new and updated crafting recipes, you can see them in the gallery or in the document linked below! It is compatible with version 1.20.1, most versions above 1.21.2 and even if it says not compatible with a version you like, you can always try! Also when the datapack gets loaded in, players unlock all available recipes! ## You are free to use this datapack in any modpack, server or similar projects. You may alter this datapack for private use. You should but don't have to credit the creator. #
ℹ️ - All Rights Reserved - Leaf's Project Information - You are allowed to include this project in any modrinth modpack. - For other requests you should contact me and ask directly. ![Discord: leafforge](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/2db72f10bea8f8b6957c432452ce8258e87e4b06.png)
